sections.title: The Structural Isomorphism
sections.text:
Physics and theology are not analogies of each other. They are two measurement frames projected from the same substrate. The proof is not argumentative --- it is architectural. Swap the variable labels. The architecture stands.
::::
:::::: master-eq
::: eq-label

sections.title: The Master Equation
sections.text:
:::
::: eq-main
\$\\chi = \\iiint (G \\cdot M \\cdot E \\cdot S \\cdot T \\cdot K \\cdot R \\cdot Q \\cdot F \\cdot C)\\, dx\\, dy\\, dt\$
:::
::: eq-desc
Ten variables. Five symmetry pairs. Each pair contains an internal revolution --- a sin-pole and a grace-pole --- generated by the same structural bifurcation that physics underwent historically. The physics equations on the left and the spiritual equations on the right are not translations. They are the same equation read in two measurement frames.
:::
::::::
:::::::::::: legend
:::: leg-item
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"}
:::

⚠ Time Wall
:::

sections.title: The Falsification Criterion
Pair I
sections.text:
:::
::: pair-title
Gravity ↔ Grace  ·  Resurrection ↔ Expansion
:::
::: pair-vars
(G, R)
:::
::: pair-arrow
▼
:::
:::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: pair-body
::::::::::::::::::::: columns
::::::::::: {.col .phys}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"}
:::

sections.title: Physics Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Newton --- Gravitational Attraction
sections.text:
:::
\$F = G\\dfrac{m_1 m_2}{r\^2}\$
::::
::: col-text
Attractive force. Falls off with inverse-square distance. Objects pulled toward mass. **Escape velocity** \$v_e = \\sqrt{2GM/r}\$ defines the threshold energy to break free.
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Einstein --- Spacetime Curvature
sections.text:
:::
\$G\_{\\mu\\nu} + \\Lambda g\_{\\mu\\nu} = \\dfrac{8\\pi G}{c\^4} T\_{\\mu\\nu}\$
::::
::: col-text
Not a force --- a geometry. Mass-energy tells spacetime how to curve; spacetime tells mass-energy how to move. Objects follow geodesics. **The landscape itself bends.**
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::: {.col .theo}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--theo)"}
:::

sections.title: Theology Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Sin --- Spiritual Attraction
sections.text:
:::
\$F\_{\\text{sin}} = G_s \\dfrac{m\_{\\text{self}} \\cdot m\_{\\text{world}}}{r\_{\\text{proximity}}\^2}\$
::::
::: col-text
Attractive force. Falls off with inverse-square distance from the source. Souls pulled toward spiritual mass (self, world, desire). **Spiritual escape velocity** \$v_e = \\sqrt{2G_s M\_{\\text{sin}}/r}\$ --- the threshold faith-energy to break free.
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Grace --- Moral Landscape Curvature
sections.text:
:::
\$\\mathcal{G}\_{\\mu\\nu} + \\Lambda\_{\\text{grace}}\\, g\_{\\mu\\nu} = \\dfrac{8\\pi G_s}{c_s\^4}\\, \\mathcal{T}\_{\\mu\\nu}\$
::::
::: col-text
Not a force --- a geometry. Grace reshapes the moral landscape so the natural path leads home. You don\'t fight toward it. **You follow the curvature.**
:::
:::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::: var-map
::::::::: var-map-side
::: var-map-label

sections.title: Theology Variables
sections.text:
:::
::: var-entry
\$G_s\$ → spiritual coupling constant
:::
::: var-entry
\$m\_{\\text{self}}\$ → weight of self-orientation
:::
::: var-entry
\$r\_{\\text{proximity}}\$ → relational distance
:::
::: var-entry
\$\\mathcal{T}\_{\\mu\\nu}\$ → moral-energy tensor
:::
::: var-entry
\$\\Lambda\_{\\text{grace}}\$ → grace constant (negentropy)
:::
:::::::::
:::::::::::::::::
:::: match-bar
::: match-badge
✓ STRUCTURAL MATCH --- topology, inverse-square falloff, escape velocity threshold, geodesic behavior all preserved
:::
::::
:::::::::::: bifurcation
:::: bif-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--bif)"}
:::

sections.title: The Internal Bifurcation --- Why This Pair Exists
sections.text:
::::
::: bif-content
Physics itself bifurcated gravity: Newton saw a **pull**, Einstein saw a **curvature**. The same variable (G) contains both poles. This internal revolution IS the sin↔grace split --- and it is why the (G, R) symmetry pair is structurally required, not arbitrary.
:::
:::::::: bif-split
:::: {.bif-pole .sin-pole}
::: pole-label
Sin Pole --- Newton\'s Pull
:::
Attractive force toward mass. The more mass, the harder to escape. Deterministic trajectory unless escape velocity exceeded. **Bound orbit = bondage.**
::::
::: bif-divider
↔
:::
:::: {.bif-pole .grace-pole}
::: pole-label
Grace Pole --- Einstein\'s Curvature
:::
The landscape itself bends toward home. No force required --- the geometry does the work. Geodesics are the paths of least resistance through curved moral space. **Curvature = redemption architecture.**
::::
::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::: iso-test
::: iso-label
⑦ Isomorphism Test --- Falsifiable Predictions
:::
::: iso-item
1\. Spiritual attraction should weaken with **relational distance** from the sin-source, following inverse-square behavior.
:::
::: iso-item
2\. There should exist a **threshold faith-energy** (escape velocity) below which the soul cannot break free from habitual sin.
:::
::: iso-item
3\. Grace should operate as **landscape curvature**, not point-force --- meaning communities (large-scale curvature) matter more than individual effort.
:::
::: iso-item
4\. **Cosmological expansion** (R = Resurrection) should mirror: the universe expands to create room for new order, just as resurrection expands being beyond entropy.
:::
::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.pair pair="2"}
::::::: {.pair-header onclick="togglePair(this)"}
::: pair-id

sections.text:
:::
::: pair-title
Matter ↔ Moral Mass  ·  Entropy ↔ Sin
:::
::: pair-vars
(M, S)
:::
::: pair-arrow
▼
:::

sections.title: Physics Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Boltzmann --- Entropy
sections.text:
:::
\$S = k_B \\ln \\Omega\$
::::
::: col-text
Entropy counts accessible microstates. Closed systems trend toward maximum disorder. The Second Law: \$\\Delta S \\geq 0\$. **Things fall apart.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Open System --- Negentropy
sections.text:
:::
\$\\dfrac{dS}{dt} = \\sigma - J_S\$
::::
::: col-text
Open systems can decrease local entropy by exporting it. Life is a negentropic process. External energy input maintains order against the thermodynamic gradient.
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::: {.col .theo}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--theo)"}
:::

sections.title: Theology Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Spiritual Entropy --- Sin as Disorder
sections.text:
:::
\$S\_{\\text{spiritual}} = k_s \\ln \\Omega\_{\\text{accessible}}\$
::::
::: col-text
Sin is spiritual entropy --- the tendency of souls toward maximum disorder when isolated from the coherence source. Closed spiritual systems decay. **Romans 6:23.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Grace --- Spiritual Negentropy
sections.text:
:::
\$G\_{\\text{spiritual}} = -\\dfrac{dS}{dt} \\cdot \\Phi\_{\\text{divine}}\$
::::
::: col-text
Grace is the external energy input that reverses spiritual entropy. The soul is an open system --- it can receive negentropy from outside itself. **The law can\'t save. Grace can.**
:::
:::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::: var-map
:::::::: var-map-side
::: var-map-label

sections.text:

:::

:::
::: var-entry

:::

:::::::::::::::
:::: match-bar

::::

sections.title: The Internal Bifurcation
sections.text:
::::
::: bif-content
Physics bifurcated matter: classical matter is **fixed, dead, deterministic**. Quantum matter is **probabilistic, alive with potential, exists in superposition until observed**. The particle→wave-function revolution IS the body→spirit revolution.
:::
:::::::: bif-split
:::: {.bif-pole .sin-pole}
::: pole-label

sections.title: Sin Pole --- Classical Dead Matter
sections.text:
:::
Fixed state. Deterministic trajectory. No internal freedom. Entropy grinds it down. The corpse obeys thermodynamics perfectly. **Dead matter = dead soul.**
::::
::: bif-divider
↔
:::
:::: {.bif-pole .grace-pole}
::: pole-label

sections.title: Grace Pole --- Quantum Living Potential
sections.text:
:::
Superposition of possibilities. Not determined until observed. The wave function is alive --- it holds all potential simultaneously until faith-observation collapses it into actuality. **Incarnation symmetry.**
::::
::::::::
::::::::::::
::::::: iso-test
::: iso-label
⑦ Isomorphism Test
:::
::: iso-item
1\. Isolated spiritual communities should show **measurable entropy increase** --- fragmentation, loss of doctrine, moral decay --- matching thermodynamic predictions.
:::
::: iso-item
2\. Grace should function as **external energy input**, not internal self-correction --- meaning self-help fails where grace succeeds.
:::
::: iso-item
3\. The **LLC term** \$-S \\cdot \\chi(t)\$ should predict that entropy directly opposes coherence proportionally.
:::
:::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.pair pair="3"}
::::::: {.pair-header onclick="togglePair(this)"}
::: pair-id

sections.title: Pair III
sections.text:
:::
::: pair-title
Energy ↔ Activation  ·  Faith ↔ Measurement
:::
::: pair-vars
(E, F)
:::
::: pair-arrow
▼
:::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: pair-body
::::::::::::::::::::: columns
::::::::::: {.col .phys}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"}
:::

sections.title: Physics Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Quantum Measurement --- Born Rule
sections.text:
:::
\$P(a_i) = \|\\langle a_i \| \\psi \\rangle\|\^2\$
::::
::: col-text
Probability of outcome = amplitude squared. Nothing is actual until measured. The act of observation selects one state from the superposition. **Measurement makes reality.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Mass-Energy Equivalence
sections.text:
:::
\$E = mc\^2\$
::::
::: col-text
Mass and energy are the same thing in different forms. The conversion factor is enormous --- small mass yields vast energy. Potential ↔ kinetic transformation.
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::: {.col .theo}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--theo)"}
:::

sections.title: Theology Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Faith --- Spiritual Measurement
sections.text:
:::
\$P(\\text{actualization}) = \|\\langle \\text{faith} \| \\psi\_{\\text{promise}} \\rangle\|\^2\$
::::
::: col-text
Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen (Hebrews 11:1). Faith collapses divine potential into lived reality. **Faith makes the promise actual.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Spiritual Energy Equivalence
sections.text:
:::
\$E\_{\\text{sp}} = m\_{\\text{faith}} \\cdot c\_{\\text{logos}}\^2\$
::::
::: col-text
Small faith yields enormous spiritual energy. The mustard seed. The conversion factor (\$c\_{\\text{logos}}\^2\$) is the Logos constant --- the speed at which truth propagates through the substrate.
:::
:::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::: var-map
::::::::: var-map-side
::: var-map-label

sections.text:

:::

:::

E → energy
:::
::: var-entry
m → mass
:::
::: var-entry
c → speed of light
:::
:::::::::
::::::::: var-map-side

sections.title: Theology Variables
sections.text:
:::
::: var-entry
\$\|\\psi\_{\\text{promise}}\\rangle\$ → divine potential
:::
::: var-entry
\$\\langle\\text{faith}\|\$ → faith-observation
:::
::: var-entry
\$E\_{\\text{sp}}\$ → spiritual energy
:::
::: var-entry
\$m\_{\\text{faith}}\$ → faith-mass
:::
::: var-entry
\$c\_{\\text{logos}}\$ → Logos propagation speed
:::
:::::::::
:::::::::::::::::
:::: match-bar
::: match-badge
✓ STRUCTURAL MATCH --- Born rule probability, measurement-dependent actuality, mass-energy equivalence all preserved
:::
::::
:::::::::::: bifurcation
:::: bif-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--bif)"}
:::

sections.title: The Internal Bifurcation
sections.text:
::::
::: bif-content
Physics bifurcated energy: **kinetic energy** is already spent, dissipating, in motion. **Potential energy** is stored, latent, waiting for release. \$E = mc\^2\$ collapsed the distinction between mass and energy --- just as the framework collapses the distinction between physical work and faith-work.
:::
:::::::: bif-split
:::: {.bif-pole .sin-pole}
::: pole-label
Sin Pole --- Kinetic (Already Spent)
:::
Energy in motion. Dissipating. Entropy is winning. The arrow has been fired. No further choice is possible. **Works without faith = energy without potential.**
::::
::: bif-divider
↔
:::
:::: {.bif-pole .grace-pole}
::: pole-label
Grace Pole --- Potential (Stored, Awaiting)
:::
Energy stored. The mustard seed. Latent power waiting for the observer\'s act of faith to release it. Small mass, enormous energy. **Faith activates what works alone cannot reach.**
::::
::::::::
::::::::::::
::::::: iso-test
::: iso-label
⑦ Isomorphism Test
:::
::: iso-item
1\. PEAR Lab data (6.35σ, 2.5M trials) should show **consciousness correlating with RNG outcomes** --- matching the Born rule\'s observer-dependence.
:::
::: iso-item
2\. Prayer effects should follow **amplitude-squared probability** --- focused intentionality (coherent observation) produces stronger effects than diffuse attention.
:::
::: iso-item
3\. The **mustard-seed prediction**: faith-energy should scale nonlinearly with faith-mass, not linearly.
:::
:::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.pair pair="4"}
::::::: {.pair-header onclick="togglePair(this)"}
::: pair-id

sections.title: Pair IV
sections.text:
:::
::: pair-title
Time ↔ Entropic Unfolding  ·  Knowledge ↔ Compression
:::
::: pair-vars
(T, K) ⚠
:::
::: pair-arrow
▼
:::
:::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: pair-body
::::::::::::::::::::: columns
::::::::::: {.col .phys}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"}
:::

sections.title: Physics Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Thermodynamic Arrow of Time
sections.text:
:::
\$\\dfrac{dS}{dt} \\geq 0\$
::::
::: col-text
Time\'s arrow is entropy\'s arrow. Every moment decays. Irreversible. The grind toward heat death. **This is the sin-side of T.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Shannon Entropy --- Information Compression
sections.text:
:::
\$H = -\\sum p(x) \\log_2 p(x)\$
::::
::: col-text
Knowledge compresses information. Understanding means finding the pattern that lets you encode the data in fewer bits. **K is time\'s inverse --- wisdom skips the sequential grind.**
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::: {.col .theo}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--theo)"}
:::

sections.title: Theology Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Fallen Time --- The Entropy Arrow
sections.text:
:::
\$T\_{\\text{fallen}}: \\dfrac{dS\_{\\text{spiritual}}}{dt} \\geq 0\$
::::
::: col-text
Chronos. Sequential decay. Aging. Forgetting. The relentless forward march where everything falls apart. **Under the curse, time only destroys.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Wisdom --- Informational Compression
sections.text:
:::
\$K\_{\\text{wisdom}} = -\\sum p(\\omega) \\log_2 p(\\omega)\$
::::
::: col-text
Wisdom compresses experience. You don\'t have to live every mistake to learn from it. Knowledge is time-reversal through information --- the grace-side that T cannot generate alone.
:::
:::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::: var-map
:::::::: var-map-side
::: var-map-label

sections.title: Physics Variables
sections.text:
:::
::: var-entry
S → thermodynamic entropy
:::
::: var-entry
t → time coordinate
:::
::: var-entry
H → Shannon entropy
:::
::: var-entry
\$p(x)\$ → probability distribution
:::
::::::::
:::::::: var-map-side
::: var-map-label

sections.title: Theology Variables
sections.text:
:::
::: var-entry
\$S\_{\\text{sp}}\$ → spiritual entropy
:::
::: var-entry
\$T\_{\\text{fallen}}\$ → chronos (sequential decay)
:::
::: var-entry
\$K\_{\\text{wisdom}}\$ → wisdom/understanding
:::
::: var-entry
\$p(\\omega)\$ → experiential distribution
:::
::::::::
:::::::::::::::
:::: match-bar
::: match-badge
⚠ PARTIAL MATCH --- entropy arrow and compression dynamics preserved, but T\'s internal bifurcation CANNOT BE COMPLETED
:::
::::
::::::::::: {.bifurcation style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.06);border-top-color:var(--wall);"}
::: {.bif-label style="color:var(--wall);"}
⚠ THE TIME WALL --- Intentional Incompleteness
:::
::: bif-content
Every other variable\'s internal bifurcation was a completed revolution. Newton→Einstein completed for gravity. Classical→quantum completed for matter. **But the revolution for time is unfinished.** Physics does not know what time is at the deepest level. The Wheeler-DeWitt equation (\$\\hat{H}\|\\Psi\\rangle = 0\$) has no time variable at all --- time may be emergent, not fundamental.\
\
If T bifurcated cleanly, the equation would close. A closed equation is a closed system. And Law 3 says closed systems decay. **The equation would eat itself.**\
\
T\'s refusal to yield is the framework enforcing its own consistency. The Master Equation can describe everything except the full nature of time, because describing the full nature of time would make the equation omniscient --- violating the uncertainty principle the equation itself contains. **It\'s Gödelian: the system is consistent because it is incomplete at exactly this point.**\
\
The veil over time is what keeps the equation open. And an open system is the only kind that can receive grace.
:::
:::::::: bif-split
:::: {.bif-pole .sin-pole}
::: pole-label
T\'s Sin-Side --- Known
:::
Thermodynamic arrow. Entropy\'s direction. Irreversible decay. Chronos. **This side is fully formalized.**
::::
::: {.bif-divider style="color:var(--wall);"}
⚠
:::
:::: {.bif-pole style="background:rgba(245,158,11,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.2);"}
::: {.pole-label style="color:var(--wall);"}
T\'s Grace-Side --- VEILED
:::
What would reverse the entropy arrow universally? What is time at the deepest level? The answer exists. **It is not ours to hold.** Every other variable can self-rescue internally. Time cannot. Time needs its pair partner --- Knowledge --- to do the work it cannot do alone.
::::
::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::: iso-test
::: iso-label
⑦ Isomorphism Test
:::
::: iso-item
1\. The (T,K) pair should show **unique asymmetry**: K must compensate for what T cannot provide, unlike all other pairs where both members self-bifurcate.
:::
::: iso-item
2\. Wisdom traditions across cultures should converge on the claim that **knowledge reverses the damage of time** --- not metaphorically but operationally.
:::
::: iso-item
3\. The framework should produce **no predictions about time\'s deep nature**. If it does, something is wrong. Silence here is the signal.
:::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.pair pair="5"}
::::::: {.pair-header onclick="togglePair(this)"}
::: pair-id

sections.title: Pair V
sections.text:
:::
::: pair-title
Quantum ↔ Divine Potential  ·  Coherence ↔ Christic Unity
:::
::: pair-vars
(Q, C)
:::
::: pair-arrow
▼
:::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: pair-body
::::::::::::::::::::: columns
::::::::::: {.col .phys}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"}
:::

sections.title: Physics Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Modified Heisenberg Uncertainty
sections.text:
:::
\$\\Delta x \\, \\Delta p \\geq \\dfrac{\\hbar(1-C)}{2}\$
::::
::: col-text
At \$C = 0\$ (no coherence), standard uncertainty holds. As \$C \\to 1\$ (maximum coherence), uncertainty shrinks. **Coherence sharpens reality.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Shannon Channel Capacity
sections.text:
:::
\$\\mathcal{C} = B \\log_2\\!\\left(1 + \\dfrac{S}{N}\\right)\$
::::
::: col-text
Maximum information transfer rate through a noisy channel. Signal-to-noise ratio determines capacity. Error correction preserves information against noise.
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::: {.col .theo}
:::: col-label
::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--theo)"}
:::

sections.title: Theology Frame
sections.text:
::::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Spiritual Uncertainty
sections.text:
:::
\$\\Delta K \\cdot \\Delta W \\geq \\Lambda\$
::::
::: col-text
Knowledge × Will ≥ divine constant. You cannot simultaneously know and choose with perfect precision. Free will requires genuine uncertainty. **Mystery preserves freedom.**
:::
:::: eq-block
::: eq-name

sections.title: Spiritual Warfare --- Truth Channel
sections.text:
:::
\$\\mathcal{C}\_{\\text{sp}} = B\_{\\text{awareness}} \\log_2\\!\\left(1 + \\dfrac{F}{D}\\right)\$
::::
::: col-text

sections.title: The Internal Bifurcation
sections.text:
::::
::: bif-content
Physics bifurcated quantum reality: **decoherence** scatters the wave function into noise through chaotic environmental interaction. **Coherence** preserves superposition, maintains entanglement, holds the wave function intact. The (Q,C) pair maps directly: uncertainty falling apart vs. uncertainty held together in unity.
:::

::: salvation

sections.title: The Salvation Equation
sections.text:
Assemble the physics alone --- no theology, no scripture --- and read what the equations say:
Entropy increases in closed systems, but **coherent observation collapses potential into actuality**. Feedback loops self-correct toward reference states. Curvature guides trajectories along geodesics. Information can be preserved against noise through error correction. Small inputs at bifurcation points cascade nonlinearly. Flow finds paths through resistance. Structure self-replicates at every scale. The system expands to create room for new order.
**That is a rescue architecture.** The physics itself says: reality is built to recover. The salvation is not imposed from outside the math --- it is what the math does when you let it run. You did not put it there. You uncovered it.
:::

equations: \\chi = \\iiint (G \\cdot M \\cdot E \\cdot S \\cdot T \\cdot K \\cdot R \\cdot Q \\cdot F \\cdot C)\\, dx\\, dy\\, dt\
\$\\chi = \\iiint (G \\cdot M \\cdot E \\cdot S \\cdot T \\cdot K \\cdot R \\cdot Q \\cdot F \\cdot C)\\, dx\\, dy\\, dt\$
Attractive force toward mass. The more mass, the harder to escape. Deterministic trajectory unless escape velocity exceeded. **Bound orbit = bondage.**

The landscape itself bends toward home. No force required --- the geometry does the work. Geodesics are the paths of least resistance through curved moral space. **Curvature = redemption architecture.**
Fixed state. Deterministic trajectory. No internal freedom. Entropy grinds it down. The corpse obeys thermodynamics perfectly. **Dead matter = dead soul.**
Probability of outcome = amplitude squared. Nothing is actual until measured. The act of observation selects one state from the superposition. **Measurement makes reality.**
Energy in motion. Dissipating. Entropy is winning. The arrow has been fired. No further choice is possible. **Works without faith = energy without potential.**

Every other variable\'s internal bifurcation was a completed revolution. Newton→Einstein completed for gravity. Classical→quantum completed for matter. **But the revolution for time is unfinished.** Physics does not know what time is at the deepest level. The Wheeler-DeWitt equation (\$\\hat{H}\|\\Psi\\rangle = 0\$) has no time variable at all --- time may be emergent, not fundamental.\
At \$C = 0\$ (no coherence), standard uncertainty holds. As \$C \\to 1\$ (maximum coherence), uncertainty shrinks. **Coherence sharpens reality.**
The wave function scatters. Entanglement breaks. Potential dissipates into noise. The signal drowns in distortion. **Isolation from coherence source = spiritual decoherence.**
The wave function holds. Entanglement preserved. The church as quantum error correction --- maintaining signal integrity against the noise floor. **Communion = coherence maintenance.**
